text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I spot Air Groove looking a bit down.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ugh. Why didn't I notice it sooner?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes... I made quite the fool of myself.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The president kept saying things like "That's the
last straw" and "I'm clutching at straws" during
lunch today.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I knew she must have been driving at a pun of
some kind, but I couldn't figure out what it was
for the life of me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: But I just realized—I was drinking sparkling water with a straw the entire time!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: The answer was right there in front of me! Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to cheer her up, despite her... unique reason
for being upset.
